paths.name: @/api/lib/branded-types
paths.message: Handlers must receive SafeId from macros (workspaceAccessMacro, authMacro) or actor session validation, not construct it from raw strings.

paths.name: @/api/db
paths.message: Handlers must not construct scoped DB instances from the root db module. Use ctx.scopedDb or createRootScopedDb from lib/root-scoped-db.ts.

paths.name: @/api/db
paths.message: Handlers must not import the root db. Use ctx.scopedDb, or move owner-level DB access into a narrow lib helper.

paths.name: @/api/db/root
paths.message: Handlers must not import the root db module. Use ctx.scopedDb, or move owner-level DB access into a narrow lib helper.

paths.name: ai
paths.message: Use defineTool from chat-tools.ts instead of tool() directly. defineTool automatically wraps execute with safeExecute.
